title: Questis
subtitle: My current day job
paragraphs: Questis is a financial wellness solution that uses certified planners and next generation software to help your employees. It’s research-based, practical, and actionable. And it’s much more than just managing your employees’ 401(k).

This is the Questis marketing site that they use to market their signature app, MyQuestis, as an employee benefit program. They utitlize a blog to push content out about their strategies and philosophies regarding investing and saving for retirement.
author: Curtis Blanton

title: MyQuestis Go
subtitle: Also my day job
description: The MyQuestis suite of apps provide a harmonious eco-system for a company's employees to manage their finances and spending habits, and get expert advice from Questis' financial experts.
paragraphs: The MyQuestis suite of apps provide a harmonious eco-system for a company's employees to manage their finances and spending habits, and get expert advice from Questis' financial experts.

On top of this employee app, I maintain a 'reverse' app that allows the Questis financial experts to review and update an employees financial plan. Also, there's a third app for employers to see the ROI they are receiving on their investment in the Questis software.
All apps work across all computer platforms and devices. If you would like a demo of the MyQuestis app, please email at curt.blanton@gmail.com.
author: Curtis Blanton

title: Charleston Bonsai
subtitle: My other (hopefully some day) day job
description: My other (hopefully some day) day job
paragraphs: One of my passions and hobbies, for the past few years I've been collecting, training and growing bonsais in my back yard.
With the help of one of my childhood friends that shares the same passion, we hope to have Charleston, South Carolina's first commercial nursery of quality pre-bonsai and bonsai stock.
With no formal business established yet, we do sell, or rent, trees on an as-available basis. Visit our Facebook page for more info.
author: Curtis Blanton

title: Barret Brock Logo
subtitle: Military and corporte consultations
paragraphs: A buddy of mine started a consulting gig out in Las Vegas after he finished up his term in the Air Force and needed a quick logo prototype. Since his main focus was military contracting, so I gave it a little red, white and blue feel.
author: Curtis Blanton

title: Wild Bill Creations
subtitle: Web site design and creation
paragraphs: Wild Bill has been making quality custom skateboards and longboards for over 15 years.

This was a site design and implementation I did for a friend a year or so ago. Just a simple 3 section site that used animations to transition to each section. This site is no longer up and running, but you can see screen shots of it below.
Check out Wild Bill's Instagram link below to see some of his work.
author: Curtis Blanton
